message:
fix(fcp-audit): verify ChainHead quorum signatures (br-ax97w)

crates/fcp-audit/src/lib.rs verify_chain_with_signers previously
verified AuditEntry signatures but delegated head authentication to
verify_chain(), which only checks head-entry linkage and
signature_count consistency — NEVER cryptographically verifies
ChainHead.signatures. An attacker who can tamper with a serialized
ChainHead could swap the quorum signatures for arbitrary bytes while
preserving head_entry / head_seq / zone_id / signature_count, and
verify_chain_with_signers would still return Ok(report).

## Fix

1. New domain separator
     CHAIN_HEAD_SIG_DOMAIN = b"FCP2-AUDIT-CHAIN-HEAD-SIG-V1"

2. ChainHead::signing_bytes() -> Vec<u8>
     Canonical transcript binding:
       zone_id, head_entry, head_seq, coverage (as bps u64 for
       determinism), epoch_id, signature_count.
     Intentionally EXCLUDES the signatures field to break the
     recursion. DOES commit to signature_count so a producer cannot
     silently add or drop a signature entry after quorum.

3. ChainHead::verify_signatures(&key_lookup) -> Result<(), AuditError>
     Iterates signatures, resolves each issuer_kid via the supplied
     closure, Ed25519-verifies against signing_bytes(). Fail paths:
       SignerMissing      — head.signatures is empty
       UnknownIssuer      — kid not resolvable / non-hex kid
       SignatureInvalid   — wrong-length bytes, kid mismatch, or
                            Ed25519 verify rejects

4. verify_chain_with_signers now calls head.verify_signatures(&key_lookup)
   after entry verification and BEFORE delegating to verify_chain.
   Head authentication is now all-or-nothing on the quorum.

## Regression tests (5 new)

  verify_chain_with_signers_accepts_signed_head
  verify_chain_with_signers_rejects_head_with_no_signatures
    (the canonical tamper payload: signature_count=1 but
     signatures list emptied out)
  verify_chain_with_signers_rejects_head_with_forged_signature_bytes
  verify_chain_with_signers_rejects_head_signed_by_unknown_issuer
  chain_head_signing_bytes_changes_on_any_covered_field_tamper
    (tamper each of zone_id, head_seq, coverage, signature_count,
     epoch_id, head_entry and assert the signing transcript flips)

## Verified

  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-swarm-p2 cargo test --offline \
    -p fcp-audit --lib
  -> 380 passed; 0 failed (was 375 + 5 new).
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-swarm-p2 cargo test --offline \
    -p fcp-audit --lib verify_chain_with_signers
  -> 7 passed (3 pre-existing + 4 new head-side).

Closes flywheel_connectors-ax97w.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
